prompt: Flat minimal macOS UI design mockup in the visual style of the Reporter app by Nicholas Felton: full-bleed solid color background filling the entire image edge to edge, one question per screen, large quiet grotesque sans-serif typography (like SF Pro), white and semi-transparent white text, no gradients, no drop shadows, no cards, no window chrome, no menu bar, no decoration, no illustration, no photographic elements, generous negative space. A precise flat UI screenshot. Solid deep teal (#0E7C6B) background. A single huge white word centered: 'Noted.'. Below it a small dim line: 'this window closes itself'. Nothing else, vast calm empty teal space.
